text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Think there'll be a Triple Crown champion this
year?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Beats me! But personally, I've got my eye on...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the long-awaited Satsuki Sho.
Expectations couldn't be higher for the first leg of
the Triple Crown. However...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, about this "Smart Falcon"... Doesn't she
usually compete in dirt races?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder why she's running today. Is she gonna be
okay?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Maybe she's just as good on turf. At any rate, I've
heard her concerts are a blast...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
People seem shocked to see me here. Figures, I
guess.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah. I knew this would happen.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
On dirt, I'm the up-and-coming Umadol
everyone's talking about...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But here, I'm just a regular runner. It makes sense
for everyone to be a little confused.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's fine with me, though! I have faith in myself.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm super-duper nervous, but... I've got to believe
I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've already come this far. The only thing left to
do is grab that center spot!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna show all my fans just how good I can
sing on a big stage!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes waver, but only slightly. Nonetheless,
she steps up to the challenge, choosing to believe
in herself...
choice_data_list: L-O-V-E! Who do we love? Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
...Haha, I should know this by now. I'm not on my
own.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the cheer. Time to go! ☆
